abort.no_usb_device_found: No Paperang P2 printer found via USB. Make sure the printer is connected and powered on.
abort.no_ble_device_found: No Paperang P2 printer found via Bluetooth. Make sure the printer is powered on and in range.
abort.already_configured: This Paperang printer is already configured. To add another printer, connect a different one via USB or BLE.

error.communication_failed: Failed to communicate with the selected device. Check the connection and try again.
error.device_not_found: Selected device not found. It may have been disconnected.
error.no_usb_device_found: No Paperang P2 printer found via USB. Make sure the printer is connected and powered on.
error.no_ble_device_found: No Paperang P2 printer found via Bluetooth. Make sure the printer is powered on and in range.

user.title: Add Paperang P2 Printer
user.description: Select USB or Bluetooth to discover your Paperang P2 printer.

select_device.title: Select USB Device

select_ble_device.title: Select Bluetooth Device
